scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('../dist/python_embedded/python.exe')) { console.log('Embedded Python bulunamadi, indiriliyor...'); require('child_process').execSync('python ../scripts/build_embedded.py', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('../dist/python_embedded/python.exe')) { console.log('Embedded Python bulunamadi, indiriliyor...'); require('child_process').execSync('python ../scripts/build_embedded.py', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
